{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# Debian з”ЁжҲ·ж·»еҠ иҜҘе…¬й’Ҙ");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpg --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-key '95C0FAF38DB3CCAD0C080A7BDC78B2DDEABC47B7'");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpg --export '95C0FAF38DB3CCAD0C080A7BDC78B2DDEABC47B7' | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b(" tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/cran_debian_key.gpg > /dev/null");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# Ubuntu з”ЁжҲ·ж·»еҠ иҜҘе…¬й’Ҙ");t.b("
" + i);t.b("wget -qO- ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/bin/linux/ubuntu/marutter_pubkey.asc | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b(" gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/cran_ubuntu_key.gpg");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# жӣҙж–°иҪҜд»¶еҢ…");t.b("
" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get update");t.b("
" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get install r-base-dev");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
